headline: COO Stock Rises on Q2 Earnings Beat, FY26 Revenue Guidance Trimmed
summary: Cooper Companies beats Q2 EPS and sales estimates as CooperVision and CooperSurgical hit record revenues, even with a GAAP loss from recall litigation.

raw.headline: COO Stock Rises on Q2 Earnings Beat, FY26 Revenue Guidance Trimmed

headline: FMS Launches kinexus Digital Platform for Home Dialysis Care
summary: Fresenius Medical Care launches kinexus, a home dialysis platform integrating remote monitoring, prescription management and supply ordering for PD and HHD.

raw.headline: FMS Launches kinexus Digital Platform for Home Dialysis Care
raw.summary: Fresenius Medical Care launches kinexus, a home dialysis platform integrating remote monitoring, prescription management and supply ordering for PD and HHD.

headline: GE HealthCare Gains FDA Clearance for AI Radiation Planning Software
summary: GEHC wins FDA clearance for AI-powered radiation planning software, adding new clinical models and a pathway for faster future updates.

raw.headline: GE HealthCare Gains FDA Clearance for AI Radiation Planning Software
